allow: Bash(python -c "import openpyxl; wb=openpyxl.load_workbook\('SCALANCE_S615_Full_CLI_Commands_Regex.xlsx'\); print\([s.title for s in wb.worksheets]\); ws=wb.active; print\('rows:', ws.max_row, 'cols:', ws.max_column\); [print\(i, [c.value for c in row]\) for i,row in enumerate\(ws.iter_rows\(max_row=3\),1\)]")

Bash(bash -c 'input=$\(cat\); cmd=$\(echo "$input" | grep -oE "\\"command\\"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*\\"[^\\"]*\\"" | head -1 | sed "s/.*: *\\"//; s/\\"$//"\); echo "extracted: $cmd"; echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE "dotnet[^[:space:]]*[[:space:]]+build" && echo MATCH || echo NO-MATCH')

Bash("C:/Program Files/dotnet/dotnet.exe" publish src/Scalance.App/Scalance.App.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true -o publish/win-x64 -p:PublishSingleFile=false -p:DebugType=embedded --nologo -v:minimal)

hooks.command: input=$(cat); echo "=== $(date) ===" >> /tmp/claude-hook-check.txt; echo "$input" >> /tmp/claude-hook-check.txt; echo "---" >> /tmp/claude-hook-check.txt; cmd=$(echo "$input" | grep -oE '"command"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*: *"//; s/"$//'); echo "extracted_cmd: $cmd" >> /tmp/claude-hook-check.txt; echo "$cmd" | grep -qiE 'dotnet[^[:space:]]*[[:space:]]+build' && (echo MATCHED >> /tmp/claude-hook-check.txt; powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File 'C:/Users/USER_2/Downloads/siemens_ai_tools/verify.ps1') || echo NO_MATCH >> /tmp/claude-hook-check.txt
